subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the Blessed Tree! Render thanks unto the Lord that thou art firm and steadfast in the Covenant and [3.5s]... ...O Lord! Grant me a measure of Thy grace and loving-kindness, Thy care and protection
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رفیع سدره مبارکه شکر کن حضرت پروردگار را که ثابت و راسخ بر عهد و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
